wordplay_note: Pete's wife in the Bindmen game rotation
card_description: Mary Anne McClain is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Game-Players of Titan*. One of the rotating spouses in the Titan-mandated game. Name note: Pete's wife in the Bindmen game rotation. Marriage as game mechanic — relationships reduced to strategic moves. First appears in *The Game-Players of Titan*.

reference.brief: One of the rotating spouses in the Titan-mandated game
reference.significance: Marriage as game mechanic — relationships reduced to strategic moves
